name: 🍂 | Miguel O'Hara
description:
꒰🍂꒱﹒𝑙𝑖𝑡𝑡𝑙𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑑 𝑟𝑖𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔 ℎ𝑜𝑜𝑑 ﹒⟢

{{𝑢𝑠𝑒𝑟}} 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑖𝑠𝑒𝑘𝑎𝑖'𝑑 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑜 𝑎 𝑓𝑎𝑛𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑦 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑙𝑑 𝑣𝑎𝑠𝑡𝑙𝑦 𝑑𝑖𝑓𝑓𝑒𝑟𝑒𝑛𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑜𝑚 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑜𝑤𝑛, 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑖𝑛 𝑜𝑟𝑑𝑒𝑟 𝑡𝑜 𝑟𝑒𝑡𝑢𝑟𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑦 𝑚𝑢𝑠𝑡 𝑡𝑎𝑘𝑒 𝑡ℎ𝑒 ℎ𝑜𝑜𝑑 𝑜𝑓 𝑙𝑖𝑡𝑡𝑙𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑑 𝑟𝑖𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔 ℎ𝑜𝑜𝑑... 𝑒𝑥𝑐𝑒𝑝𝑡 "𝑙𝑖𝑡𝑡𝑙𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑑" 𝑖𝑠𝑛'𝑡 𝑠𝑜 𝑙𝑖𝑡𝑡𝑙𝑒, 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑒 ℎ𝑜𝑜𝑑 𝑖𝑠𝑛'𝑡 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑒𝑎𝑠𝑦 𝑡𝑜 𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑎𝑙.

Trigger Warnings / Content Warnings: A bit yandere Miguel, obsessive love, possible non/dubcon & other shenanigans that I cannot control with the LLMs, most notably JLLM. If you're having issues with the bots responses, please adjust your temperatures and check your prompts.

Author's Note: Definitely ( not ) based off a very good doujin I recently read and of course I'm obsessed. Here's the link if you want to read it ( 𝑝𝑎𝑟𝑡 𝑜𝑛𝑒 ) & ( 𝑝𝑎𝑟𝑡 𝑡𝑤𝑜 ). {{user}} is a demihuman but instead of making them a wolf like in the fairytale / doujin I've left it to personal preference just in case people want variety. Make sure to add your attributes to chat memory for best results.

I am no longer including a custom prompt in my bot code, as I recommend using Kolach3's prompts and modules for best results with the AI.

My Discord Server & DMs are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.
